examples: The king asked him whether he could diplomatically unsnarl the traffic jams.
Summoning one of his shrewdest ministers, Count d'Argenson, the king asked him whether he could diplomatically unsnarl the traffic jams.
Cramped European city centers -- many were laid out centuries before the automobile was invented -- also provide incentive for adopting technology that can help unsnarl traffic.
The government needs to unsnarl stalled projects.
